Class UserDAO

java.lang.Object
DB.DBController
DAO.UserDAO
public class UserDAO extends DBController
Data Access Object (DAO) for managing all user types in the system, including Subscriber, Guest, Manager, and Supervisor. This class handles polymorphic database operations and integrates with UserFactory to instantiate the correct User subclasses based on their roles.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserDAO

      public UserDAO()

  • Method Details

    • InsertUser

      public Boolean InsertUser(User u)
      Inserts a new user into the database. The method determines the user type through polymorphic checks (instanceof) to populate the correct columns, such as membership code for subscribers.
      Parameters:
      u - the User entity to be inserted.
      Returns:
      true if the insertion was successful, false otherwise.

    • insertGuestAndReturnId

      public int insertGuestAndReturnId(User g)
      Registers a new guest and returns their database-generated unique ID.
      Parameters:
      g - the guest user to insert.
      Returns:
      the auto-generated integer ID if successful, -1 otherwise.

    • insertGuestAndReturnId2

      public int insertGuestAndReturnId2(User g)
      Alternative guest insertion that uses a custom random ID generator. Useful when the business logic requires IDs within a specific numeric range.
      Parameters:
      g - the guest user to insert.
      Returns:
      the manually generated random ID if successful, -1 otherwise.

    • generateRandomUserId2

      private int generateRandomUserId2()
      Generates a unique 6-digit user ID and verifies it doesn't already exist.
      Returns:
      a unique 6-digit integer.

    • userExists

      private boolean userExists(int userId)
      Checks if a specific User ID exists in the database. * @param userId the ID to check.
      Returns:
      true if the user exists, false otherwise.

    • getUserByPhone

      public User getUserByPhone(String phone)
      Retrieves a user from the database based on their phone number.
      Parameters:
      phone - the phone number string.
      Returns:
      a User object if found, null otherwise.

    • getUserByEmail

      public User getUserByEmail(String email)
      Retrieves a user from the database based on their email address. * @param email the email address to search for.
      Returns:
      a User object if found, null otherwise.

    • UpdateUser

      public Boolean UpdateUser(User u)
      Updates an existing user's profile information. Supports updating names and usernames for roles that possess them.
      Parameters:
      u - the user object containing the updated fields.
      Returns:
      true if at least one row was updated.

    • readAllUsers

      public List<User> readAllUsers()
      Retrieves all users registered in the system.
      Returns:
      a List of all User entities.

    • getUser

      public User getUser(int userId)
      Retrieves a specific user by their unique ID.
      Parameters:
      userId - the ID to search for.
      Returns:
      the User object if found, null otherwise.

    • getUserByMembershipCode

      public User getUserByMembershipCode(int code)
      Fetches a subscriber specifically by their unique membership code.
      Parameters:
      code - the membership integer code.
      Returns:
      the User (typically a Subscriber) if found, null otherwise.
